InitCmd.message: Create EtherCAT SyncUnit PlcTask1 (set to PREOP)
Create Object Outfeed Prog Instance-0 - Device 3 (EtherCAT) 1
Enable online change 'Outfeed Prog Instance-0 - Device 3 (EtherCAT) 1'
